changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Tissue cassette' AND description = 'sampleType name'

changeSet.comment: Add localization for Tissue cassette sample type - intermediate container in histopathology workflow

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'tissue cassette'

changeSet.comment: Add Tissue cassette sample type - perforated plastic container for tissue processing

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Tissue cassette' AND description = 'sampleType name')

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Paraffin block' AND description = 'sampleType name'

changeSet.comment: Add localization for Paraffin block sample type - embedded tissue after cassette processing

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.type_of_sample WHERE LOWER(description) = 'paraffin block'

changeSet.comment: Add Paraffin block sample type - embedded tissue ready for sectioning

column.name: name_localization_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.localization WHERE english = 'Paraffin block' AND description = 'sampleType name')

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Update Sample Processing page to include cassette workflow step

column.name: instructions
column.value: Process specimens through the histopathology workflow: GROSSING: Examine specimen, document gross findings, select tissue for processing. CASSETTING: Transfer tissue sections into labeled cassettes (perforated plastic containers). PROCESSING: Run cassettes through tissue processor (fixation, dehydration, clearing, paraffin infiltration). EMBEDDING: Orient processed tissue in paraffin block. MICROTOMY: Cut thin sections (3-5 um) from paraffin block. MOUNTING: Mount sections onto labeled glass slides. Track each step with cassette ID -> block ID -> slide ID for full traceability.

column.name: content

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

column.name: instructions
column.value: Create slides, blocks, aliquots while maintaining traceability.

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Update Testing page to use specific hierarchy IDs (cassetteId, blockId, slideId)

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform diagnostic or research assays on sample-derived material. Each test should reference the specific slide ID (which traces back to block ID and cassette ID). STAINING: Apply routine stains (H&E, Pap, Giemsa) or special stains (AFB, GMS, PAS) as indicated. ADVANCED TECHNIQUES: IHC/ICC for protein markers, ISH for nucleic acid targets, special research assays. CONTROLS: Run positive and negative controls with each batch; document results. MICROSCOPY: Pathologist/PI examines stained slides, documents findings, and enters diagnosis. Track all tests by slide ID for complete traceability.

update.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4
